name: Goat Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup drained oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes, cut julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place whole cloves of garlic with olive oil in a heavy small baking dish.
3. Bake until the garlic is soft and brown, about 15 minutes.
4. Carefully remove the skins from the garlic; transfer it to a medium bowl.
5. Mash the garlic to form a paste.
6. Add goat cheese and sun-dried tomatoes to the bowl. Mix well.
7. Allow the spread to cool completely before serving.
8. The recipe can be prepared up to 4 days in advance and stored refrigerated. Let stand for at least 1 hour before serving.
